title: Database corruption following INSERT with a TRIGGER that does an affinity change
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE fuzz_ob_t2(tt VARCHAR(255) PRIMARY KEY, ss INT);
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_ob_t1_ai AFTER INSERT ON fuzz_ob_t1 FOR EACH ROW INSERT INTO fuzz_ob_t2(tt) VALUES(CAST(NEW.ii AS VARCHAR(255)));
CREATE TRIGGER fuzz_ob_t2_ai AFTER INSERT ON fuzz_ob_t2 FOR EACH ROW UPDATE fuzz_ob_t2 SET ss = 4;
key_bug_features: INSERT with nested triggers converting TEXT to INTEGER
